summary: Verified US-843 observability diagnostics for AI no-legal-action failures, illegal auto-turn choices, and stuck/trace context. Source inspection confirms no-legal-action errors include phase and active actor plus seed and state hints such as current bid, contract step/contract, play mode/trick size, or continuation state. Harness diagnostics for illegal/stuck auto-turn failures include seed, step, phase, actor, legal action set, chosen action when present, recent trace context, and cause. Targeted diagnostic tests and full release-gate verification passed. This app is a static/local browser game with no backend, live API, or production telemetry sink; MVP observability is provided through actionable local test/development thrown-error output.

tests_run.command: npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts
tests_run.evidence: Vitest reported 3 files passed and 13 tests passed, including no-legal-action diagnostic assertions and illegal auto-turn harness diagnostic assertions.
Vitest reported 12 files passed and 111 tests passed; tsc and vite build completed successfully.

node_package_scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build

verification_environment.project_scope_note: No backend, live API, or external telemetry pipeline exists for this MVP static browser app; observability verification is local thrown-error/test/development output.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Dependency reports were reviewed as exact listed paths; source and fresh test commands were used for final MZ-304 acceptance.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: src/ai/heuristicAi.ts:260; src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts no-legal-actions diagnostic test; npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Automated assertions check phase and actor directly; source inspection confirms seed and state hints for current bid, contract step/contract, play mode/trick size, and continuation states.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: src/test/integrationHarness.ts:257; src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts:193; npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Harness output provides the legal action set via formatted legal action keys rather than a separate numeric count; the task strategy allows legal action keys/count or legal set, so this is accepted.
Local deterministic test/build verification only; no backend/live service path applies to this static MVP.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 hierarchy; package.json; local source inspection
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: The app is a Vite static browser game using local code and browser storage; no production telemetry/backend exists in MVP scope.

evidence_matrix.scenario: AI failure path when rules expose no legal actions.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/ai/heuristicAi.ts buildNoLegalActionsMessage; src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts no-legal-actions diagnostic assertion
evidence_matrix.limitations: Diagnostic behavior is verified through thrown local errors in unit tests and source inspection, not through external telemetry.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Illegal chosen action from the auto-turn harness produces actionable reproduction context.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/test/integrationHarness.ts buildHarnessFailureMessage; src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts illegal harness diagnostic assertions
evidence_matrix.limitations: Diagnostic test forces an illegal choice rather than relying on a naturally failing seed, which is appropriate for a forced diagnostic path.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Phase-aware AI diagnostics remain tied to current phase and recent action trace across representative AI decision scenarios.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts representative phase matrix; npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Representative deterministic local integration tests cover bidding, contract ordering, widow pickup, discard, whist, all-pass, misere, contract play, settlement, and next-deal states rather than exhaustive seed permutations.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Classify observability evidence for static MVP without backend/live API/telemetry.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: package.json scripts; PERSONAL-EP-180 static Vite/browser-local scope; npm run verify
evidence_matrix.limitations: No live API, backend service, production telemetry, security, migration, or accessibility path is implicated by this observability verification task.
